package rulecoverage

func NegativeTextTemplateForHtml() string {
    ruleID := "text_template_for_html"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`text/template` used to generate HTML content (check for HTML tags in template literals or `.html` file extensions in `ParseFiles`)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
